sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98860" key="sumproxwre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπρο-χωρέω</orth>, <sense id="n98860.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go forward together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.215</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
